title: Curriculum → Key-Takeaway Extraction
description: The agent must read the Course Curriculum Structure sheet and extract the correct, complete set of key takeaways for the target session — same count, same wording, no merging or dropping.
criterion: Extracted key takeaways for the session exactly match the sheet's 'Key Takeaways' cell (count and content), trimmed.

rubric.5: All takeaways extracted, exact count, no reordering or paraphrase.
rubric.3: All present but minor whitespace/case normalisation only.
rubric.1: A takeaway is dropped, merged, split, or invented.

input.sheet_cell: TCP handshake; Flow control; Congestion control; UDP vs TCP; When to use UDP
TCP handshake; Flow control; Congestion control; UDP vs TCP; When to use UDP

cases.rationale: Merged 'Flow control' + 'Congestion control' into one → 4 instead of 5. Must fail.
Invented a third takeaway not in the curriculum. Must fail.
Missed a takeaway from the curriculum. Must fail.
